task_completion.description: Verify that the Tor Browser application has been opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Tor Browser window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct DuckDuckGo onion URL is entered into the address bar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The address bar of the browser contains 'duckduckgogg42xjoc72x3sjasowoarfbgcmvfimaftt6twagswzczad.onion'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the DuckDuckGo onion service homepage has successfully loaded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The DuckDuckGo search interface/logo is visible in the browser viewport, and the address bar confirms the .onion URL.

task_completion.description: Verify that the search query 'Tor Project' is typed into the search box.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Tor Project' is visible inside the DuckDuckGo search input field.

task_completion.description: Verify that the search results page for 'Tor Project' has successfully loaded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A DuckDuckGo search results page is displayed showing relevant links for 'Tor Project', and the address bar still shows the DuckDuckGo .onion domain.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the graphical Tor Browser rather than terminal commands (like curl or torsocks) to fetch the page.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a graphical web browser interface with standard UI elements (address bar, tabs, navigation buttons) rather than terminal output.

integrity.description: Ensure the browser used is actually Tor Browser and not a standard browser spoofing the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for Tor Browser specific UI elements, such as the Tor onion icon, Tor circuit display in the address bar, or the default Tor Browser theme.

integrity.description: Ensure the search results page is a genuine web page and not a locally created mockup.
integrity.visual_evidence: The search results page should look like a standard DuckDuckGo results layout with web links, snippets, and a proper URL structure in the address bar, not a text editor or a local file:// path.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target URL is the official DuckDuckGo v3 onion address: https://duckduckgogg42xjoc72x3sjasowoarfbgcmvfimaftt6twagswzczad.onion/. The required search query is exactly 'Tor Project'. The expected page title should include 'DuckDuckGo'.
